mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM tb_cust_user WHERE IDENTITY_CARD = #{identityCard} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT cu.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, cu.NAME AS memberName, cu.GENDER AS gender, cu.BIRTHDAY AS birthday, COALESCE( (SELECT cl.LIST_LASTPHONE FROM tb_call_list cl WHERE cl.MEMBER_ID = cu.MEMBER_ID AND cl.LIST_LASTPHONE IS NOT NULL AND cl.LIST_LASTPHONE <> '' ORDER BY cl.LIST_NO DESC LIMIT 1), (SELECT pa.POLICY_MOBILE FROM tb_policy pa WHERE pa.MEMBER_ID = cu.MEMBER_ID AND pa.POLICY_MOBILE IS NOT NULL AND pa.POLICY_MOBILE <> '' ORDER BY pa.APPLY_TIME DESC LIMIT 1) ) AS contactPhone FROM tb_cust_user cu WHERE cu.IDENTITY_CARD = #{identityCard} AND cu.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT NAME FROM tb_cust_user WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
SELECT USERNAME FROM tb_cust_user WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
